title: chrysopogon gryllus subsp. echinulatus
intro: Chrysopogon gryllus subsp. echinulatus, also known as Vetyvera or Vetyver grass, is a species of grass native to India and Sri Lanka. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Chrysopogon gryllus subsp. echinulatus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and decoctions, and is often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
